positive: Minimalist forest spirit: A stylized, highly detailed silhouette of a mystical woodland creature, resembling a combination of deer, fox, and glowing lantern mushrooms. The creature is posed gracefully, leaping through an ancient, stylized forest archway. The style is neo-tribal, incorporating geometric dot-work and engraved line art. The composition is centered, highly symmetrical, and features strong black ink silhouettes against a muted palette of emerald green, deep indigo, and burnt sienna. Focus on clean lines, solid shapes, and high contrast for printing. Vector illustration style, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, low quality, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, poorly rendered, signature
